step.title: Warning
step.text:
Exception in parallel rsync: ExitCode: 123, Output: Run rsync from: /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to: /home/site/wwwroot/ in 8 parallel threads Delete options: clean=True, use manifest=False, directory to ignore= Prev manifest = /tmp/tmp4UUQGi.tmp and next /tmp/tmp4UUQGi.tmp Cleaning up /tmp//filelist.txt and /tmp//splits Creating a list of all files at /tmp//filelist.txt No directory to exclude. Created /tmp//filelist.txt. Total number of files to be synced = 29. Created batches from the list of files. Processing 4 files in each thread Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.aa from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ab from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ac from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ad from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ae from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.af from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ag from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/ Running rsync for filelist /tmp//splits/split.ah from /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/ to /home/site/wwwroot/
